title: The Coding Train
data: Welcome to the Coding Train with Daniel Shiffman! A community dedicated to learning creative coding with beginner-friendly tutorials and projects on YouTube and more. Welcome to the Coding Train with Daniel Shiffman! A community dedicated to learning creative coding with beginner-friendly tutorials and projects on YouTube and more. All aboard! Welcome to all beginners and code-curious individuals ready for a journey of self-expression and playful coding.
